final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input [7:0] i0,
    input [7:0] i1,
    input alu_op,
    output reg [7:0] o
);always @(posedge clk) begin
        case(alu_op)
            1'b0: o = i0 + i1;
            1'b1: o = i0 << i1;
        endcase
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      o = i0 - i1; o = i0 >> i1;
    end
  end

endmodule
